## Safety checklist

- [ ] No private manuscripts, raw chat logs, credentials, or personal data are included.
- [ ] Examples use synthetic or public-safe content.
- [ ] Documentation links were checked.
- [ ] Any retrieval or iteration behavior change is explained.
